footer.tagline: High-quality yarn, crochet accessories and unique handmade products. Custom orders available!

home.slide1Desc: Over 50 diverse colors, perfect for handmade crochet and gifts
home.slide2Desc: Each product is handcrafted with care, a meaningful gift for every occasion
home.slide3Desc: Knitting needles, hooks, safety eyes, stuffing — all in one store
home.categoriesSubtitle: Find products that match your interest
home.customBannerDesc: Send a reference photo, choose your yarn color and size — we'll create something special just for you!
home.review1Text: The yarn is very soft and the color matches the photos, fast delivery. This is my 3rd purchase!
home.review2Text: The handmade teddy bear is even better than I expected, everyone praised it as a gift. Will order again!
home.review3Text: The shop gave great advice, high quality yarn, reasonable price. Very satisfied!
home.review4Text: Ordered a custom bear, the shop made it exactly as per my reference, carefully packaged.
home.blogSubtitle: Learn new techniques from experienced crafters
home.blog1Title: How to Choose the Right Yarn
home.blog1Desc: A guide to selecting the right yarn type for each of your crochet projects.
home.blog2Desc: Start your crochet journey with 5 essential stitches everyone needs to know.
home.blog3Title: Making a Teddy Bear from Yarn A to Z
home.blog3Desc: Step-by-step instructions to create an adorable handmade teddy bear.
home.newsletterDesc: Subscribe and get a 10% discount code for your first order
home.newsletterNote: You can unsubscribe at any time. No spam!

howToBuy.title: How to Buy
howToBuy.subtitle: Simple, fast shopping process at Yarn Shop
howToBuy.step1Desc: Browse categories or search for the product you want. View details, photos, and reviews from other customers.
howToBuy.step2Desc: Click "Add to Cart" or "Buy Now". You can continue shopping or proceed to checkout.
howToBuy.step3Desc: Enter your name, phone number, and shipping address. Logged-in customers can select saved addresses.
howToBuy.step4Desc: Standard (3–5 days): 30,000₫ | Express (1–2 days): 50,000₫ | Economy (5–7 days): 15,000₫. Free standard shipping for orders from 500,000₫.
howToBuy.step5Desc: Choose Cash on Delivery (COD) or bank transfer. Apply discount codes if available.
howToBuy.step6Desc: Our staff will call to confirm your order and shipping address within 2–4 hours (during business hours).
howToBuy.step7Desc: Track your order status via your account. Inspect items before paying (for COD).
howToBuy.payment1Desc: Pay cash upon receipt. Inspect the product before paying.
howToBuy.payment2Desc: Vietcombank | Techcombank | Momo. Order processed after payment is confirmed.

customOrder.howItWorks: How it works: After submitting, our team will review your request and provide a price quote within 1–2 business days. You'll need to pay a 50% deposit to start production.
